steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage frames Synge as a Nobel laureate whose work deserved recognition for contributing “the greatest benefit to mankind” — the blank must describe how his work advanced the field of chemistry.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Advancement in” directly expresses how Synge's work progressed the field of chemistry — precisely what the Nobel Prize honors. The other choices either fail to capture improvement or contradict the passage's emphasis on beneficial contribution. That matches choice B — B is correct.
